notes: As-built U-values only. Engineer should enter directly for EWI/IWI on solid walls (certified value expected).
Bands A-E solid brick: use formula_type='brick_thickness', call solidBrickUValue(thicknessMm)
Bands A-E stone: use formula_type='stone_granite' or 'stone_sandstone', call stoneUValue(thicknessMm)
Filled cavity rows are included as 'current state' regardless of when CWI was installed.
Ground floors are excluded — calculated via BS EN ISO 13370 from area/perimeter in the app.
Thermal bridging y-factors (Table 21) are stored separately, not in this library.
Age band M (2023+) values taken from M column where shown. Not all regions publish M separately.
† means assumed as-built in RdSAP source. * means applies only if insulation added subsequently.
We include † rows (they are current-state values). We exclude * rows (retrofit insulation — enter directly).
insulation_mm: only relevant for rows where added insulation changes the base as-built value.
For formula rows, u_value is null — compute at runtime using formula_type + thicknessMm.

walls._comment: === SOLID BRICK — age bands A-E use thickness formula (Table 13), F+ use fixed values ===

walls.description: Solid brick, as built — U-value depends on wall thickness (measure on site)
walls.notes: Measure wall thickness including plaster. Formula applies to age bands A-E only.

walls._comment: === STONE: GRANITE OR WHINSTONE — bands A-E use formula, F+ fixed ===

walls.description: Stone: granite or whinstone, as built — U-value depends on wall thickness (measure on site)
walls.description_detail: Formula: U = 45.315 × W^(-0.513) where W is wall thickness in mm
walls.notes: Applies to age bands A-E. Measure wall thickness on site.

walls.description: Stone: granite or whinstone, as built
walls.notes: Note 'a': use formula if calculated U-value < 1.7
